examples: Living in a hut is like staying in a goldfish tank and sitting quietly, you can see angelfish, parrotfish, barracuda, and snappers peeping through the window.
Angelfish are an easy - to - keep cichlid species.
If you want to truly get away, aside from jogging on the lunar surface, I highly recommend frolicking with angelfish in the Caribbean.
Just an hour from Khasab are dive sites with schools of blue and yellow Indian Ocean angelfish, Arabian butterfly fish, snappers, lionfish, groupers, stingrays and turtles.
